zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Baudouin III de Guines於1198年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯i斯時，他的父親Comte Arnould II de Guînes22歲，母親Béatrice de BOURBOURG19歲。他於1215年與Mahaut de Fiennes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1244年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德布爾布格享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Baudouin III de Guines于1198年出生在法国帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯i斯时，他的父亲Comte Arnould II de Guînes22岁，母亲Béatrice de BOURBOURG19岁。他于1215年与Mahaut de Fiennes结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1244年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德布爾布格享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guines
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Basque: Castilianized form of Ginea, a habitational name from a place called Ginea, in Araba/Álava province, Basque Country (Spain).

variants.name: Guiney
meanings: Irish (Cork and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Géibheannaigh, ‘son of Géibheannach’, from géibheannach ‘fettered’. See also Keaveny . In counties Kerry and Cork the name may possibly be a corruption of Ó Géibheannaigh.

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Baudouin III de Guines was born in 1198, in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, was 22 and his mother, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, was 19. He married Mahaut de Fiennes in 1215. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1244, in Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Baudouin III de Guines est né en 1198, à Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mahaut de Fiennes en 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1244, à Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Baudouin III de Guines 1198 in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Arnould II de Guînes 22 und seine Mutter Béatrice de BOURBOURG 19. Er hat 1215 Mahaut de Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Baudouin III de Guines è nato il nel 1198 nel Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Mahaut de Fiennes nel 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1244, nel Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Baudouin III de Guinesが1198年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父Comte Arnould II de Guînesは22歳，母Béatrice de BOURBOURGは19歳であった。1215年にMahaut de Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1244年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードボウルボウルグで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Baudouin III de Guines(이)가 1198년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Arnould II de Guînes(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de BOURBOURG(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1215년 Mahaut de Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 부르보우르그에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Baudouin III de Guines nasceu em 1198, em Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Mahaut de Fiennes em 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1244, em Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Baudouin III de Guines родился в 1198 г. в местности гуiнесь, калеи, пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Arnould II de Guînes было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de BOURBOURG, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Mahaut de Fiennes в 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности бурбург, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Baudouin III de Guines nació en 1198, en Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Mahaut de Fiennes en 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1244, en Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 46 años.
